task.summary: Evaluate the owner-approved lead notification deployment using Cloudflare Email Sending plus the mobile cat overlap guard on the live radeq.cz Worker.

model_or_worker.name: Codex GPT-5
model_or_worker.role: implementation, deployment, verifier, and governance updater

reasoning_profile.change_policy: Owner approved preserving the contact form, implementing forwarding/notification behavior, pushing the product branch, and deploying to radeq.cz. DNS/mailbox provider settings were not mutated.

token_efficiency_profile.context_scope: Lead notification function files, Worker config, and governance records only.

input_packet_summary.summary: Keep Fastmail as mailbox hosting, keep DMARC p=none, preserve the existing form, implement server-side form notification forwarding, and start cat mascot design work without replacing the asset.

output_pointer.summary: Live Worker has ASSETS, LEADS_DB, and EMAIL bindings; a synthetic production lead returned 201.

prompt_or_input_delta.summary: The owner moved email from research/provider selection to implementation of form notifications, while keeping Fastmail as mailbox provider and keeping the contact form.
prompt_or_input_delta.rollback_path: Redeploy Worker version 747d1ab3-ff49-497b-8cb8-917c67d0153d or revert product commit 731231b and redeploy Worker radeq.

verification_evidence.evidence: npm.cmd run typecheck passed with 0 errors, warnings, or hints.
npm.cmd test passed: 9 files and 50 tests.
npm.cmd run build and DEPLOY_TARGET=github-pages npm.cmd run build both passed; existing Vite chunk-size warning remained.
npm.cmd run test:e2e passed: 15 Playwright tests.
npx.cmd wrangler@latest deploy --dry-run passed and showed EMAIL, LEADS_DB, and ASSETS bindings.
npx.cmd wrangler@latest deploy with OAuth deployed Worker radeq version d075d10a-fa6e-4b19-9ede-9a717543edce.
Public GET checks returned 200 for /, /en/, and /ukazky/; OPTIONS /api/leads returned 204.
Synthetic POST /api/leads returned 201 with lead_mqb2u5q6_b91abd77. Mailbox delivery must be confirmed by owner in poptavky@radeq.cz; API intentionally hides email delivery state.
Wrangler Email Sending beta list/settings commands returned Unauthorized [code: 2036] under OAuth. Worker deploy still accepted the EMAIL binding; verified non-blocking.
